name: clara
description: Clara runs interviews, transcribes evidence, corrects decks, creates checked retail attribute reports, analyzes business data, and prepares reviewed advisory outputs.

interface.longDescription: Clara handles interviews, transcripts, deck correction, retail attribute reporting, and business-data analysis. Its Reporting Engine profiles a dataset, selects a suitable analysis with Codex, and runs embedded distribution, funnel, mix, period-comparison, scatter, overlap, statement, or variance components. For advisory projects, Clara organizes evidence, separates sources from judgement, and prepares reviewed workpapers and decision outputs. The user keeps professional judgement; Codex performs semantic work and local review.
defaultPrompt: Use Clara to organize this advisory project, update the evidence map, surface gaps, and identify decisions that cannot wait.
Use Clara to run this interview, transcribe this recording, or correct this deck while preserving approved content.
Use Clara on this dataset: map retail attributes or choose and render the right business chart, then check the final report.
